# Sangam Herbals

> Sangam Herbals is an Ayurvedic brand offering authentic Ayurvedic remedies, cosmetics, oils and foods — prepared to classical Ayurvedic texts, made in India under the direction of Dr. Praveen Rathi, and delivered worldwide. The catalogue spans everyday wellbeing, skin, hair and daily care.

## What it is
- A worldwide direct-to-consumer store for authentic Ayurvedic products, made in India to traditional preparation and applicable quality/labelling standards.
- Every product lists its ingredients and traditional usage openly, in plain language.
- Ships internationally; delivery times and any duties are shown at checkout before you confirm.

## Key facts
- Made in India under Dr. Praveen Rathi.
- Products are for wellbeing and traditional care only — not a medicine, and not a substitute for professional medical advice. Consult a doctor before use if pregnant, breastfeeding, on medication, or under medical care.
- Sister product: **Sangam Skin**, an Ayurvedic skincare app (AI skin analysis + matched serum routines) — https://skin.sangamherbals.com

## Common questions
- **Is Ayurveda safe / how do I use it?** Products are traditional plant-based preparations with clear directions; consult a doctor first if pregnant, breastfeeding, on medication, or under medical care.
- **How do I choose if new?** Start with one product for one everyday concern rather than several at once.
- **Are products authentic and labelled?** Made in India under Dr. Praveen Rathi to traditional Ayurvedic preparation, with ingredients and usage listed openly.
- **Do you ship to my country?** Yes — international shipping; charges/duties shown at checkout.

- Legal / shipping / returns / privacy: https://sangamherbals.com/legal.html
